prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-BLE-BAMBOODUSTPANBRUSHSET-13IN-AMZ Product Type: SHOVEL_SPADE Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille 2pc Dust Pan and Brush Set with Bamboo Handle Cleaning Supplies Household Essentials, 13 Inch Description: Easily tackle everyday dry messes in style with Beille’s Modern Dust Pan and Brust Set! Measuring 13 x 8 inches, Beille’s dust pan and brush set is a must have household essentials item that will make quick work of dry messes in the kitchen, laundry room, garage, entryway, bathrooms and more.

The dust pan itself is lightweight and easy to carry between spaces; it comes with a built in TPR rubber edge to keep pan in place and to improve debris collection efficiency. The dust pan brush features a sustainable bamboo handle that ensures a comfortable and ergonomic grip when sweeping. The dust pan brush also boasts non scratch bristles that are soft but dense, easily cleaning up messes with just a few sweeps! And lastly, the top of the dust pan features built in teeth to help remove unwanted materials from the brush.

Beille’s dust pan and brush set both feature built in hanging holes for convenient accessibility when not in use, while the space saving brush and pan easily snap together, helping to keep storage areas, cabinets or closets tidy and organized. The natural bamboo handle and pop of confetti-like design lend a stylish but organic and neutral finish to any kitchen, bathroom, laundry room and more.

Designed to make the cleaning up dry messes quickly and efficiently, Beille’s modern, stylish and functional dust pan and brush set will be a welcomed addition to any home.

CARE: Easily rinse with soap and warm water and pat dry; to maximize longevity, avoid submerging bamboo in water for long periods of time Search Terms: Dust pan; dustpan and brush set; household essentials; kitchen essentials; garage organization; laundry room décor and accessories; cleaning tools; cleaning supplies; home and kitchen; housewarming gifts new home; new home essentials; pet supplies Features: - DUST PAN AND BRUSH SET: Measuring 13(L) x 8(W) inches, Beille’s dust pan and brush set is a must have household essentials item that will make quick work of dry messes in the kitchen, laundry room, garage, entryway, bathrooms and more - SMART DESIGN: Dust pan is lightweight and easy to carry between spaces; non scratch bristles are soft but dense, easily picking up messes with just a few sweeps, while built in pan teeth help to remove unwanted materials from the brush; sustainable bamboo handle makes for a comfortable grip - CONVENIENT STORAGE: Dust pan and brush set both feature built in hanging holes for convenient accessibility when not in use; space saving brush and pan easily snap together, helping to keep storage areas, cabinets or closets tidy and organized - MODERN DESIGN: Natural bamboo handle and pop of confetti-like design lend a stylish but organic and neutral finish to any space; to maximize longevity, avoid submerging bamboo in water for long periods of time - SPECIFICATIONS: Dimensions: 13 x 8 x 2.25 inches; Weight: 0.52lbs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 13 in Dust Pan and Brush Set with Bamboo Handle

tokens.name: Dust Pan and Brush Set with Bamboo Handle

openai.item_name: Beille 2-pk 13 in Dust Pan and Brush Set

anthropic.title_differentiation: 2-Piece Set, Bamboo Handle, Built-in Teeth, Hanging Holes, Space-Saving Snap Design

openai.title_differentiation: Natural Bamboo Handle, Non Scratch Bristles, Built-In Pan Teeth, Snap Together Storage, Hanging Holes
